---
title: "Wine Quality EDA"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: true
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path

import pandas as pd

OUTPUT_DIR = Path("../analysis/output")


def read_indexed_csv(name):
    return pd.read_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / name, index_col=0)


def read_plain_csv(name):
    return pd.read_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / name)
```

## Red Wine

```{python}
read_indexed_csv("red_summary.csv")
```

![](../analysis/output/figures/red_distributions.png)

![](../analysis/output/figures/red_pearson_correlation.png)

![](../analysis/output/figures/red_spearman_correlation.png)

```{python}
read_plain_csv("red_pca_summary.csv")
```

![](../analysis/output/figures/red_pca_eigenvalues.png)

## White Wine

```{python}
read_indexed_csv("white_summary.csv")
```

![](../analysis/output/figures/white_distributions.png)

![](../analysis/output/figures/white_pearson_correlation.png)

![](../analysis/output/figures/white_spearman_correlation.png)

```{python}
read_plain_csv("white_pca_summary.csv")
```

![](../analysis/output/figures/white_pca_eigenvalues.png)

## Combined

```{python}
read_indexed_csv("both_summary.csv")
```

![](../analysis/output/figures/both_distributions.png)

![](../analysis/output/figures/both_pearson_correlation.png)

![](../analysis/output/figures/both_spearman_correlation.png)

```{python}
read_plain_csv("both_pca_summary.csv")
```

![](../analysis/output/figures/both_pca_eigenvalues.png)
